name: xG conversion
notes: Rank 1 of 58 | Tier 1 — Core Driver | Process KPI | Strongest predictor of winning in AUS. Measures how efficiently the team converts expected-goal chances into goals.

name: CORSI%
notes: Rank 2 of 58 | Tier 1 — Core Driver | Process KPI | Even-strength shot-attempt share. Best proxy for territorial control and sustained offensive pressure at 5-on-5.

name: Scoring chances
notes: Rank 3 of 58 | Tier 1 — Core Driver | Process KPI | High-danger shot volume. Directly linked to goal probability. Tier 1 offensive process driver.

name: Shots on goal
notes: Rank 4 of 58 | Tier 1 — Core Driver | Process KPI | On-net shot volume. Consistent Tier 1 predictor of offensive activity and pressure generation.

name: Net xG (xG - Opponent's xG)
notes: Rank 5 of 58 | Tier 1 — Core Driver | Process KPI | xG differential. Best combined on-ice metric — accounts for both offensive creation and defensive concession.

name: Shots
notes: Rank 6 of 58 | Tier 2 — Important Driver | Process KPI | Total shot attempts. Strong proxy for offensive puck possession and sustained territorial pressure.

name: Opponent's xG
notes: Rank 7 of 58 | Tier 2 — Important Driver | Process KPI | Quality and volume of scoring chances allowed. Primary defensive process measure. Lower = better.

name: xG (Expected goals)
notes: Rank 8 of 58 | Tier 2 — Important Driver | Process KPI | Cumulative expected goals generated. Volume of quality chance creation — closely paired with xG conversion.

name: Successful power play
notes: Rank 9 of 58 | Tier 2 — Important Driver | Process KPI | Power play goals scored. Most direct measure of man-advantage execution.

name: OZ play with shots
notes: Rank 10 of 58 | Tier 2 — Important Driver | Process KPI | OZ possession sequences that produce a shot. Highest-quality measure of productive offensive zone time.

name: Power play, %
notes: Rank 11 of 58 | Tier 2 — Important Driver | Process KPI | PP conversion rate. Efficiency of man-advantage situations. Strong special teams predictor.

name: Entries
notes: Rank 12 of 58 | Tier 2 — Important Driver | Process KPI | Total zone entries. Drives offensive possession — more entries means more shots and more OZ time.

name: Passes to the slot
notes: Rank 13 of 58 | Tier 2 — Important Driver | Process KPI | Passes delivered into the high-danger slot area. Key pre-shot movement indicator. Dal priority development area.

name: Offensive play
notes: Rank 14 of 58 | Tier 2 — Important Driver | Process KPI | Total offensive zone possession time. Broad measure of sustained forward pressure.

name: OZ play
notes: Rank 15 of 58 | Tier 2 — Important Driver | Process KPI | Offensive zone possession sequences. Correlated with controlled zone time and shot generation.

name: EV DZ retrievals
notes: Rank 16 of 58 | Tier 2 — Important Driver | Process KPI | Even-strength puck retrievals in own zone. Higher count signals prolonged defensive zone time. Lower = better.

name: EV OZ retrievals
notes: Rank 17 of 58 | Tier 2 — Important Driver | Process KPI | Even-strength puck retrievals in offensive zone. Reflects ability to sustain pressure and win puck battles up ice.

name: Missed shots
notes: Rank 18 of 58 | Tier 2 — Important Driver | Process KPI | Off-target shot volume. Reflects overall shooting activity and offensive zone presence.

name: Short-handed, %
notes: Rank 19 of 58 | Tier 2 — Important Driver | Process KPI | PK success rate. Strong predictor of special teams defensive performance.

name: Puck losses in NZ
notes: Rank 20 of 58 | Tier 2 — Important Driver | Process KPI | Neutral zone turnovers. Interrupts transition and generates direct counter-attacks. Dal priority defensive gap.

name: Pre-shots passes
notes: Rank 21 of 58 | Tier 2 — Important Driver | Process KPI | Passes completed immediately before a shot. Measures pre-shot movement quality — reflects shot setup.

name: Defensive play
notes: Rank 22 of 58 | Tier 2 — Important Driver | Process KPI | Total defensive zone possession time. Lower = less time under pressure in own end.

name: Accurate passes, %
notes: Rank 23 of 58 | Tier 2 — Important Driver | Process KPI | Pass completion rate. Reflects puck management quality and execution under pressure.

name: % shots on goal
notes: Rank 24 of 58 | Tier 2 — Important Driver | Process KPI | Shot accuracy rate (shots on goal ÷ total shots). Reflects shot quality and net presence.

name: Puck losses in DZ
notes: Rank 25 of 58 | Tier 2 — Important Driver | Process KPI | Turnovers in own defensive zone. Creates immediate high-danger scoring opportunities for opponents.

name: Puck battles in DZ
notes: Rank 26 of 58 | Tier 2 — Important Driver | Process KPI | Puck battle events in own zone. Fewer DZ battles = less time under defensive pressure.

name: Puck battles won, %
notes: Rank 27 of 58 | Tier 2 — Important Driver | Process KPI | Rate of puck battle success across all zones. Reflects compete level at board battles.

name: OZ possession
notes: Rank 28 of 58 | Tier 2 — Important Driver | Process KPI | Offensive zone possession time. Broader territorial control measure — overlaps with OZ play.

name: Takeaways in DZ
notes: Rank 29 of 58 | Tier 3 — Supporting Indicator | Process KPI | Steals by the team in own defensive zone. High count signals prolonged DZ pressure.

name: DZ possession
notes: Rank 30 of 58 | Tier 3 — Supporting Indicator | Supporting Context | Defensive zone possession time. Lower = less time under pressure in own end.

name: xG per goal
notes: Rank 31 of 58 | Tier 3 — Supporting Indicator | Supporting Context | xG required per goal scored. Lower = more clinical finishing relative to shot quality generated.

name: Breakouts
notes: Rank 32 of 58 | Tier 3 — Supporting Indicator | Supporting Context | Zone exit events from own end. Fewer breakouts needed signals less time defending own zone.

name: Opponent's xG per goal
notes: Rank 33 of 58 | Tier 3 — Supporting Indicator | Supporting Context | xG opponent requires per goal scored against Dal. Higher = opponents shooting inefficiently.

name: Goals For
notes: Rank 34 of 58 | Tier 1 — Core Driver | Outcome/Context | Outcome metric. Scoring is the objective of offensive play, but kept low-weighted so process indicators — xG, scoring chances, OZ possession — remain dominant.

name: Opponent's xG per shot
notes: Rank 35 of 58 | Tier 3 — Supporting Indicator | Supporting Context | Average xG value of each opponent shot allowed. Lower = better shot suppression and defensive structure.

name: xG per shot
notes: Rank 36 of 58 | Tier 3 — Supporting Indicator | Supporting Context | Average shot quality generated. Higher = better shot selection and chance quality.

name: Puck battles in NZ
notes: Rank 37 of 58 | Tier 3 — Supporting Indicator | Supporting Context | Neutral zone puck battles. Lower count may reflect cleaner transition play.

name: Faceoffs won, %
notes: Rank 38 of 58 | Tier 3 — Supporting Indicator | Supporting Context | Overall faceoff win rate. Provides clean possession starts. Rate version only — counts excluded.

name: Faceoffs won in DZ, %
notes: Rank 39 of 58 | Tier 3 — Supporting Indicator | Supporting Context | DZ faceoff win rate. Reduces immediate pressure in own zone following icing or goalie freezes.

name: NZ possession
notes: Rank 40 of 58 | Tier 3 — Supporting Indicator | Supporting Context | Neutral zone possession time. Proxy for transition control — teams that own the NZ control game flow.

name: Blocked shots
notes: Rank 41 of 58 | Tier 3 — Supporting Indicator | Supporting Context | Dal's shots blocked by opponents. Fewer = better shot lane creation.

name: Shots blocking
notes: Rank 42 of 58 | Tier 3 — Supporting Indicator | Supporting Context | Shots blocked by Dal defenders. Reflects shot-blocking effort and defensive commitment.

name: Penalty kill retrievals
notes: Rank 43 of 58 | Tier 3 — Supporting Indicator | Supporting Context | Puck retrievals while on the penalty kill. Lower preferred — signals cleaner PK execution.

name: Faceoffs won in NZ, %
notes: Rank 44 of 58 | Tier 3 — Supporting Indicator | Supporting Context | NZ faceoff win rate. Influences transition possession directly from neutral zone draws.

name: Faceoffs won in OZ, %
notes: Rank 45 of 58 | Tier 3 — Supporting Indicator | Supporting Context | OZ faceoff win rate. Maintains offensive zone possession after stoppages.

name: Counter-attack with shots, %
notes: Rank 46 of 58 | Tier 3 — Supporting Indicator | Supporting Context | Rate at which counter-attacks produce a shot. Reflects transition efficiency and quick-strike ability.

name: Puck battles in OZ
notes: Rank 47 of 58 | Tier 3 — Supporting Indicator | Supporting Context | Puck battle events in offensive zone. More OZ battles = more sustained offensive zone pressure.

name: Short-handed time
notes: Rank 48 of 58 | Tier 3 — Supporting Indicator | Supporting Context | Total ice time while shorthanded. Better PK burden measure than count alone — captures major penalties and extended kills.

name: Penalty time
notes: Rank 49 of 58 | Tier 3 — Supporting Indicator | Supporting Context | Total penalty minutes taken. Lower = better discipline and fewer PK situations faced.

name: Counter-attack with shots
notes: Rank 50 of 58 | Tier 4 — Context Metric | Supporting Context | Counter-attacks that generate a shot. Reflects transition-to-shot conversion.

name: Dump ins
notes: Rank 51 of 58 | Tier 4 — Context Metric | Supporting Context | Dump-in zone entries. Paired with Entries — allows calculation of controlled entry rate.

name: Takeaways in OZ
notes: Rank 52 of 58 | Tier 4 — Context Metric | Supporting Context | Steals in offensive zone. Generates immediate high-danger chances. Dal development priority.

name: OZ play with shots, %
notes: Rank 53 of 58 | Tier 4 — Context Metric | Supporting Context | Percentage of OZ sequences that include a shot. Secondary efficiency context — overlaps with OZ play with shots.

name: Counterattacks
notes: Rank 54 of 58 | Tier 4 — Context Metric | Supporting Context | Total counter-attack sequences. Volume context — paired with counter-attack shot % for effectiveness.

name: Puck losses in OZ
notes: Rank 55 of 58 | Tier 4 — Context Metric | Supporting Context | Turnovers in offensive zone. Near-noise (|r|=0.02). Retained for zone-level completeness.

name: Power play retrievals
notes: Rank 56 of 58 | Tier 4 — Context Metric | Supporting Context | Puck retrievals during power plays. Lower preferred — signals cleaner PP execution.

name: Takeaways in NZ
notes: Rank 57 of 58 | Tier 4 — Context Metric | Supporting Context | Neutral zone steals. Minimal predictive power (|r|=0.01). Retained for zone-level completeness.

name: Dump outs
notes: Rank 58 of 58 | Tier 4 — Context Metric | Supporting Context | Dump-out exits from own zone. Context dependent — can reflect smart zone exits or passive defending.
